en.title: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 44

blocks.value: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 44
Top Question of the Week
What’s the most important thing to keep up with right now in the DIGITALAX ecosystem?

Out of everything going on, the most exciting thing to keep up to date with is the upcoming Realm Runway event during NY Fashion Week. This is being hosted February 12th in the heart of SoHo & Tribeca NYC.
We are featuring both digital and physical designs and collections from across the Global Designer Network, and also launching the very first models into this space!
There are a whole tonne of announcements to come! Stay tuned this week as all final details get released!
Most Common Repeat Question
When will the Global Models Syndicate be officially announced?

If you read the latest release of DIGIFIZZY— issue 9 — you would have seen a sneakpeek of some of the first models that have joined the syndicate and are entering the web3 x metaverse scene! We’ll have an official announcement out later this week as we finalise everything before the first Realm Runway event!
Top Controversies in the Industry
More Beanie drama… did they really think it would never catch up to them? 😆 Yeah.. probably 🤦‍♀️
Primary wealth sources are and will always be more catalytic, robust and self-advancing than secondary speculation.
Silly Fails and Trolling
This view is so misinformed that I wasn’t even sure that it was worth including in this week’s edition. But then again, this is FUD FAQ.

One of the best extracts from Olson’s 2 hour long deceitful condemnation of NFTs and web3 comes around halfway through with the line “Most projects aren’t backed by anything substantial… that goes for both billionaire projects and rug pulls… there isn’t really any meaningful difference.”

This is interesting. Because, in some ways he is right. The majority of people in the market today can’t tell the difference between a blue chip project and fake copycat crap on the market. In fact, this is one of the core reasons why we have seen so much hype and speculation this past year, over substance.

The most important thing for anyone wanting to get into this market & start leveraging it efficiently so that it can work for them, is to begin with learning the difference between what makes some of these new wealth generating tools and assets real authentic web vs knockoff fakes pretending to be web3.
View all FUD FAQ here.
If you would like a question answered or contribute content to next weeks article please reach out through our DIGITALAX Discord server in #FUD-FAQ channel!

ar.title: FUD FAQ | ثريد مجتمعي اسبوعي | اسبوع 44

blocks.value: FUD FAQ | ثريد مجتمعي اسبوعي | اسبوع 44
Top سؤال من ال اسبوع
What’s ال most important thing الى keep up مع right now في ال DIGITALAX النظام?

Out من everything going على, ال most exciting thing الى keep up الى تاريخ مع is ال upcoming Realm Runway event during NY فاشون اسبوع. This is being hosted February 12th في ال heart من SoHo & Tribeca NYC.
We are featuring both ديجيتال و physical designs و collections من across ال Global Designer Network, و also launching ال very first models into this space!
There are a whole tonne من announcements الى come! Stay tuned this اسبوع as all final details get released!
Most Common Repeat سؤال
When will ال Global Models Syndicate be officially announced?

If you read ال latest release من DIGIFIZZY— issue 9 — you would have seen a sneakpeek من some من ال first models that have joined ال syndicate و are entering ال web3 x metaverse scene! We’ll have an official announcement out later this اسبوع as we finalise everything before ال first Realm Runway event!
Top Controversies في ال Industry
More Beanie drama… did they really think it would never catch up الى them? 😆 Yeah.. probably 🤦‍♀️
Primary wealth sources are و will always be more catalytic, robust و self-advancing than secondary speculation.
Silly Fails و Trolling
This view is so misinformed that I wasn’t even sure that it was worth including في this اسبوع’s edition. But then again, this is FUD FAQ.

One من ال best extracts من Olson’s 2 hour long deceitful condemnation من NFTs و web3 comes around halfway through مع ال line “Most projects aren’t backed by anything substantial… that goes لـ both billionaire projects و rug pulls… there isn’t really any meaningful difference.”

This is interesting. Because, في some ways he is right. ال majority من people في ال market today can’t tell ال difference between a blue chip project و fake copycat crap على ال market. في fact, this is one من ال core reasons ليه we have seen so much hype و speculation this past year, over substance.

ال most important thing لـ anyone wanting الى get into this market & start leveraging it efficiently so that it can work لـ them, is الى begin مع learning ال difference between what makes some من these جديد wealth generating tools و assets real authentic web vs knockoff fakes pretending الى be web3.
